Name: sapdme_nonconformance_v2
Title: Nonconformance
ShortText: Manage nonconformances as part of quality checks
Description: In a manufacturing process, product defects are often found as part of quality checks. Use this service to retrieve logged nonconformances and check for open nonconformances.
